title: Trump threatens Iran with 'much higher level' bombing if it doesn't agree to peace deal — 'Epic Fury' restarts
snippet: Trump posted on Truth Social: 'If they don't agree, the bombing starts, and it will be, sadly, at a much higher level and intensity than it was before.' Refers to Operation Epic Fury restart. Also states there is 'never a deadline' for Iran to agree. Threat came alongside reports of proximity to one-page MoU. Dual approach: diplomacy + coercion. MoU provisions detailed: nuclear non-weaponization, enhanced inspections, no underground facilities, gradual sanctions lift, frozen funds release.
tag_reason: 5/6 신규 위협 발언. 이전 폭격 위협(4/19 '인프라 파괴')과 수위 다름 — 'much higher level'.
